category_sources: Official libmemcached homepage describes an open source C/C++ client library and tools for memcached.
source_facts.description says it is a C and C++ client library to the memcached server.
docs_sources: Official Launchpad project states documentation can be found at docs.libmemcached.org.
Official libmemcached homepage links Documentation and describes the API reference guide.
repo_sources: Official Launchpad libmemcached project lists lp:libmemcached as project code.
source_facts.source-archive is hosted on the same official Launchpad project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies C and C++ memcached client library.
source_facts.executables lists memcat, memdump, memflush, memstat, and related CLI tools.
